ops.title: Getaway skill refactored to Python CLI with trip-centric checkpoints
ops.body:
# getaway v2 architecture (P0-P3 of the rewrite)

The bash-scripted v1 (getaway.sh + jq strings in plan-trip.js) is replaced by a Python CLI at `cli/` (uv project, flat layout). Invocation everywhere: `uv run --project "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/cli" getaway ...` — never `uvx --from` (wheel-caches by version, serves stale builds on plugin-cache updates). First call builds `cli/.venv`; skills warm it with `prefs status` at the main level.

## State model
- JSON docs are canonical: `~/.getaway/preferences.json` (durable identity), `trips/<slug>/trip.json` (per-trip memory + `plan` fan-out spec + `judgment` factor profile), `trips/current` plain-text pointer, `learnings.jsonl`. No version fields, no migrations, ever (ruling 1920b34).
- `cache.db` (SQLite, WAL) is DERIVED ONLY — `user_version` mismatch delete-and-recreates; deleting it loses zero user intent.
- All doc writes go through `paths.atomic_update`: exclusive flock on a persistent sidecar `<path>.lock` (never replaced/unlinked) held across read-merge-write, then tempfile+os.replace. Locking the target itself is WRONG — os.replace swaps inodes and a concurrent locker on the orphaned inode loses updates (repro'd, fixed in P1).

## Freshness / resume invariants
- Checkpoints live in `trips/<slug>/checkpoints.json`, keyed by phase ("sweep:<label>", "shortlist", "evidence.<factor>", "rank", ...). Fresh = inputs_fp matches + upstream_fp matches + TTL (constants.PHASE_TTL_HOURS, keyed with the ":"-suffix stripped) not exceeded.
- inputs_fp covers the trip's planning keys + the prefs keys planning consumes. Balances/statuses/credits/status_goals enter the fingerprint ONLY for rank/finalize — a balance refresh must never invalidate sweeps (would re-spend API quota).
- `sweep run` self-skips on a fresh checkpoint with ZERO HTTP (checked before client construction). This is the zero-quota resume guarantee; the integration test asserts respx call-count unchanged on re-run.
- Ranking currency (ruling 876a964 §2): band math and ordering use the bookable expanded mileage when an expand.json record exists; the expand.json write contract is that each record carries `mileage` = bookable int (rank fails loud without it). Unexpanded candidates (quota-trim) rank on shortlist mileage by definition.

## Workflow contract (plan-trip.js)
- Args are minimal: `{project, slug, refresh?, quotaFloor?}`; first statement is the JSON.parse stringified-args shim (papercut 6d2e0ad, user-approved). Everything else reads from disk via the CLI; the workflow branches ONLY on `trip status <slug>` output.
- Interpolation allowlist: project/slug/labels/factor-ids/availability-ids, each regex-validated. No jq program strings.
- One-writer: prefs set*/trip set/trip log run at the main level only; workflow persist agents write exclusively via `trip artifact write` + `trip phase-done`. Cross-session races are the sidecar flock's job.
- `shortlist` is a click GROUP: `shortlist run <slug> [--gateway]`, `shortlist onward <slug>` — not bare `shortlist <slug>`.
- Node >=24: `node --test tests/workflow/` (directory form) fails; use `node --test 'tests/workflow/*.test.mjs'`.

## Doctrine (tested by name in cli/tests)
Biases never gate (soft-avoid/departure-day/afford/status/credits order or annotate; only hard-avoids + endpoint-veto union filter; veto omitted in gateway mode); `barely` demotes within the 15% band only; classification runs over the 2x expansion buffer, truncation at rank; note tier never reorders; hybrid-absent path is inert; compositions never cost-pruned (presentation compares). Factor registry (data/factors.json) is closed data — a new factor is a row + collector prompt, never a class hierarchy.

## Hooks
Hooks resolve the CLI path from `__file__` (CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is unset under `uvx capt-hook run`) and treat `prefs status` exit 1 AND 3 as unconfigured. Trigger on `has_skill` only (capt-hook API version skew across Python 3.12/3.13).
ops.when: modifying getaway skill architecture, resuming trips, or adding new workflow phases to the planner
